THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT APPELLANT WU, XIAOZHEN RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT LEE, JAE HYO SHIN, KYOUNGSUB $300.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $300.00, THE CROSS CLAIM JUDGMENT IS REVERSED. CROSS CLAIM JUDGMENT IS ORDERED IN FAVOR OF JAE HYO LEE AND KYOUNGSUB SHIN AND AGAINST XIAOZHEN WU IN THE AMOUNT OF $3000. PRINCIPAL; $0 ATTORNEYS FEES; $750. COSTS; $0 INTEREST; FOR TOTAL $3,750.00. THE JUDGMENT ON APPEAL IS FINAL AND REPLACES THE SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT OF APRIL 26, 2017. NO EXHIBITS FILED NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WU, XIAOZHEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEE, JAE HYO SHIN, KYOUNGSUB $300.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $300.00, NO RENT IS DUE PLAINTIFF FOR THE PERIOD MID JULY THRU OCTOBER 2016 AS THE RENTAL UNIT WAS ILLEGAL AND UNINHABITABLE. UTILITY CHARGES DURING MID JULY THROUGHT OCTOBER 2016 ARE EXCESSIVE IN A UNIT WITHOUT A BATHROOM OR KITCHEN. $300.00 IS REASONABLE FOR THAT PERIOD. THE RENTAL AGREEMENT IS CANCELLED. calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Sep-01-2017 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:

Xiaozhen Wu, Appellant, assisted by Court certified Mandarin Interpreter Catherine Hong,
Jae Hyo Lee and Kyoungsub Lee, assisted by Court certified Interpreter, Korean Ted Kim

This cause comes on regularly for Trial de Novo. All parties and witnesses are sworn

With the assistance of Mandarin interpreter Cathering Hong, appellant Xiaozhen Wu testifies in her own behalf

With the assistance of Korean interpreter, Ted Kim, respondents Jae Hyo Lee and Kyoungsub Lee testify on their own behalf

The Court returns all exhibits to the submitting party

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission
Judge Pro Tem Jeffrey Wohl ; Clerk: R. Goulding; Not Reported (525)

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
